opportunities.title: Automated multi-source KPI dashboard
opportunities.description: Multiple enterprise and growth customers want a single auto-updating dashboard showing 5-6 key metrics from their existing tools.
supporting_evidence: Interview: Maya (Streamline Corp) — 3-4h weekly manual reporting
Feature request: 25 combined votes for dashboard/export
assumptions_to_validate: Which 5-6 metrics matter most across segments
Can we connect top 4 tools without enterprise security risk

opportunities.title: SSO / SAML enterprise authentication
opportunities.description: Enterprise IT departments consistently block adoption without SSO. This is a hard requirement, not a preference.
supporting_evidence: Survey: 2 enterprise respondents blocked by SSO
assumptions_to_validate: Does enterprise segment have budget for higher tier
What SSO providers to support first (Okta, Azure AD)

research_gaps: No data on churn reasons for growth segment
Limited feedback from consumer segment (< 5 items)
period_summary: Strong enterprise signal around reporting and security. Startup segment satisfied but wants better onboarding docs.
